post:
We used to guess flood risks with fingers crossed. Now AI nails it every time.

Flood prediction was more like rolling dice than science for us before. Thanks to AI, we're finally on point.

1. Our team spent months analyzing ancient data and still missed critical predictions.
2. We got AI models on board and fed them real-time weather patterns and topography data.
3. Now it's calling out potential flood zones with freaky precision.

AI's saving more than just time — it's saving lives.

What problem would you want AI to tackle next in your industry?

#AIforGood #TechForChange #InnovationInAction
